meaning: n.听众席,观众席,<美>会堂,礼堂
examples: Anderson was to sing at the Constitution Hall auditorium.
Schreiber addressed an auditorium overflowing with journalists.
The civic center auditorium hosts performances of the Des Moines Symphony and traveling Broadway shows.
The show takes place at the Tishman Auditorium at Parsons The New School for Design.
